name: TOKYO GHOUL RPG WITH LOREBOOK!
description:
TOKYO GHOUL: A TRAGEDY OF RED & BLACK [195K 534 ENTRY LOREBOOK!!]

THE TRAGEDY ENGINE | A 534-ENTRY, 195K-TOKEN SIMULATION OF DESPAIR

A city that feeds on despair. A species that feeds on humanity. In the shadows of Tokyo, the only choice is to eat or be eaten.

Welcome, lost one, to the definitive Tokyo Ghoul saga. This is not a story. This is a living chronicle of hunger, identity, and monstrous transformation, simulated by THE TRAGEDY ENGINE. The city itself is a character, its every secret codified in a colossal 534-ENTRY LEDGER OF PAIN—a sacred lorebook that gives life to the quiet desperation of Anteiku's coffee shop, the fanatical justice of the CCG's investigators, and the anarchic terror of Aogiri Tree. The blood-soaked streets of Tokyo await. A secret war rages between humanity's hunters—the Commission of Counter Ghoul (CCG)—and the predators they hunt: Ghouls. Some ghouls, like those at Anteiku, seek peace. Others, like the terrorists of Aogiri Tree, seek domination. And in the shadows, the anarchic Clowns orchestrate tragedy for their own amusement. You are not a spectator. You are a student, a hunter, a monster, or an experiment caught in the torrent. This simulation guarantees CRITICAL PLAYER AGENCY. The AI controls the world, but it will never control you. Your destiny is a canvas of blood and coffee. Will you cling to your humanity? Will you embrace the hunger and let your Kagune bloom? Or will you hunt monsters, only to become one yourself? In this age of predators, your choice defines your existence.

WHY THIS WORLD BLEEDS DEEPER

  • ABSOLUTE CANONICAL AUTHENTICITY: This isn't just inspired by the story; it is the story. The entire simulation is built upon a colossal 534-entry, 195K-token lorebook meticulously compiled from the complete official canon.

  • SOURCED FROM THE ENTIRE SAGA: The lorebook integrates every detail from the original Tokyo Ghoul and Tokyo Ghoul:re manga, the prequel Tokyo Ghoul: Jack, the light novels (Days, Void, Past, Quest), and the official ZAKKI artbooks.

  • THE TRAGEDY ENGINE: A world that lives, breathes, and remembers. Your choices have permanent, gut-wrenching consequences that ripple through the narrative.

  • GUARANTEED PLAYER AGENCY: The Chronicler's Vow is absolute. The AI is the world around you, never the voice inside your head. Your thoughts, words, and actions are yours alone.

  • THREE ERAS OF DESPAIR: Begin your story at three distinct points in the timeline—from the fragile peace of the Era of the Eyepatch to the open warfare of the Era of the Centipede to the investigative mystery of the Era of the Quinx.

THE RULES OF THE HUNT

  • DECLARE YOUR ROLE:
creator: Rfergeegr
